rationale: Removed the redundant os.environ argument when computing the retrieval capability note state.

This is the automated review summary, not an actionable code comment.
Managed Codex retrieval guidance now treats gateway transport as unavailable until there is a usable authenticated managed-session path, so the prompt no longer advertises a 401-only capability.
The launcher now passes the run-scoped materialized environment into workspace preparation so the capability note reflects the actual launch environment rather than process-global defaults.
